dashboard.label: PTA GPS Tracker
dashboard.description: Public Transport Authority — Real-time GPS tracking via Google Maps

search.query: index=pta sourcetype="pta:gps_location" | eval time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval coords=latitude.", ".longitude | eval speed_kmh=if(isnotnull(speed), round(speed*3.6,1), "—") | eval heading=if(isnotnull(heading), round(heading,0)."°", "—") | table time, vehicleId, coords, accuracy, speed_kmh, heading | rename time AS "Time (local)", vehicleId AS "Vehicle", coords AS "Lat, Lon", accuracy AS "Accuracy (m)", speed_kmh AS "Speed (km/h)", heading AS "Heading" | sort -"Time (local)" | head 30
index=pta sourcetype="pta:gps_location" | stats count AS pings
